title: physocarpus ramaleyi
intro: Physocarpus ramaleyi, also known as ninebark, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Physocarpus ramaleyi include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
